---
title: "Class 11: AlphaFold"
author: "Dea Sinaga (PID: A17725676)"
format: html
toc: true
---

```{r}
library(bio3d)

pdb <- read.pdb("hivpr_dimer_23119/hivpr_dimer_23119_unrelaxed_rank_005_alphafold2_multimer_v3_model_3_seed_000.pdb")

pdb
```

Make a vector of input PDB file names that we can read into R

```{r}
pdbfiles <- list.files("hivpr_dimer_23119/", pattern = ".pdb", full.names = TRUE)
```

```{r}
pdbs
```

```{r}
library(bio3d)

pdbs <- pdbaln(pdbfiles, fit = TRUE)
```


```{r}
rd <- rmsd(pdbs, fit = TRUE)
range(rd)
```
